input.question: Which departments have students receiving the most scholarship money?

payload.question: Which departments have students receiving the most scholarship money?

output.sql:
SELECT d.department_id AS department_id,
       d.department_name AS department_name,
       SUM(sch.amount) AS total_scholarship,
       COUNT(DISTINCT sch.student_id) AS students_with_scholarships,
       SUM(sch.amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT sch.student_id), 0) AS avg_per_student
FROM departments d
JOIN students st ON st.department_id = d.department_id
JOIN scholarships sch ON sch.student_id = st.student_id
GROUP BY d.department_id, d.department_name
ORDER BY total_scholarship DESC
LIMIT 10;

visualization.description: Top 10 departments by total scholarship amount awarded to their students.
visualization.title: Top 10 Departments by Total Scholarship Amount

payload.sql:
SELECT d.department_id AS department_id,
       d.department_name AS department_name,
       SUM(sch.amount) AS total_scholarship,
       COUNT(DISTINCT sch.student_id) AS students_with_scholarships,
       SUM(sch.amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT sch.student_id), 0) AS avg_per_student
FROM departments d
JOIN students st ON st.department_id = d.department_id
JOIN scholarships sch ON sch.student_id = st.student_id
GROUP BY d.department_id, d.department_name
ORDER BY total_scholarship DESC
LIMIT 10;
